hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); case "$f" in *.py) o=$(ruff check -q "$f" 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$o" ] && jq -n --arg c "ruff:\n$o" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PostToolUse",additionalContext:$c}}';; *.sh) o=$(shellcheck "$f" 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$o" ] && jq -n --arg c "shellcheck:\n$o" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PostToolUse",additionalContext:$c}}';; esac; exit 0

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); case "$f" in *.py) b=$(basename "$f"); o=$("${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}/node_modules/.bin/aislop" scan "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}" --json 2>/dev/null | jq -r --arg b "$b" '[.diagnostics[] | select(.filePath | endswith($b))] | map("\(.filePath):\(.line) [\(.rule)] \(.message)") | join("
")'); [ -n "$o" ] && jq -n --arg c "aislop:
$o" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PostToolUse",additionalContext:$c}}';; esac; exit 0
